subtasks.description: Query sam_licenses for current Adobe contracted state: extract product line, license count, contract end date, list price, and negotiated rate for all Adobe records. Group by product line.

Query consumption_facts for Q4 2024 actual spend and 90-day usage trend. Calculate total Q4 spend, average monthly spend, and growth rate by Adobe product line. Include current month and prior 2 months for trend analysis.

Reconcile sam_licenses contracted state with consumption_facts Q4 spend and 90-day trends. For each Adobe product line: (1) compare contracted vs. actual consumption, (2) calculate utilization rate and burn-down, (3) project 12-month trajectory, (4) recommend expand/hold/reduce posture based on contract coverage gaps, spend velocity, and usage growth signals.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks with minimal decomposition: (1) mongo_query (small) to fetch current Adobe state from sam_licenses by product line—straightforward collection query with standard filtering and grouping. (2) sql_gen (mid) for Q4 spend + 90-day trends—requires multi-month window aggregation and growth calculation but single source, warranting mid tier. (3) cross_recon (frontier) to reconcile contracted vs. consumed, project trajectory, and generate expand/hold/reduce recommendations—requires multi-signal synthesis (contract coverage, spend velocity, usage trends), utilization heuristics, and business judgment on posture, justifying frontier capability. The plan avoids unnecessary policy_action because the query asks for recommendations and classification, not compliance approval; both are part of cross_recon's reconciliation and decision output.

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "SELECT
  product,
  -- Q4 2024 total spend
  SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2024_total_spend,
  -- Q4 monthly breakdown
  SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS oct_spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date < '2024-12-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS nov_spend,
  SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS dec_spend,
  -- Average monthly spend in Q4
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) / 3.0,
    2
  ) AS avg_monthly_spend_q4,
  -- 90-day usage trend: average daily active seats per month
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN daily_active_seats END), 1) AS oct_avg_daily_seats,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-11-01' AND event_date < '2024-12-01' THEN daily_active_seats END), 1) AS nov_avg_daily_seats,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN daily_active_seats END), 1) AS dec_avg_daily_seats,
  -- Overall Q4 avg daily active seats
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN daily_active_seats END), 1) AS q4_avg_daily_seats,
  -- Month-over-month spend growth rate (Oct to Dec)
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(
      (
        SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-12-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
        - SUM(CASE WHEN event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2024-11-01' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END)
      ) * 100.0
      /
